fontSubstitution: The source references nine missing 1CamBam Stick fonts. Validation replaces them with the supplied Pixels Medium TTF in both Blender and GN-VM, with embedded outlines as the browser fallback.
validation: Authored bounds differ by at most 0.0948 units and peak Z by less than 0.000003. Four surface-control cases stay within 1.28% vertices; the shorter NODE DOJO case is within 0.29% topology but retains a known instance-placement difference.
